user: What documents are required for loan?
bot:
📁 📋 Complete document checklist:

✅ IDENTITY PROOF (Any one)
• Aadhar Card
• PAN Card
• Passport
• Voter ID
• Driving License

✅ ADDRESS PROOF (Any one)
• Aadhar Card
• Passport
• Utility Bill (<3 months)
• Rent Agreement

✅ INCOME PROOF
• Salary slips (last 3 months)
• Bank statements (last 6 months)
• Form 16 / IT Returns

✅ PHOTOGRAPHS
• 2 passport size photos

🔍 **Related topics you might like:**
• Use our EMI calculator for personalized numbers!

user: What are your current interest rates?
bot:
📊 Our interest rates start from 10.5% p.a. and go up to 24% p.a. based on your credit profile:
• 750+ CIBIL: 10.5-14%
• 700-749: 14-18%
• 650-699: 18-22%
• Below 650: 22-24%

🔍 **Related topics you might like:**
• Is interest rate fixed or floating?
• How is interest calculated on loans?
